summary: FAIL — one critical finding: docs/index.html is stale. sections.json was updated yesterday evening (17:22 UTC) with citation corrections (DOI 10.1016/j.asr.2018.01.024 → .01.022 in two places, and author 'Bernard' → 'Hinderer' for the J9-Strasbourg SG paper) and extended PRED-106 prose, but no rebuild followed. The live published site contains the incorrect DOI and wrong author attribution. test.js confirmed the staleness (1 failed check out of 3604+1). Fix: decider or next agent runs node build.js publish from a clean clone. Secondary: 9 expansion tracker live items have terminal status and should be archived (moderate, no active data risk). All other systems healthy: no broken curmudgeon reviews, no digest pipeline gaps, no workspace-sync violations, no hardcoded colors, discoverability infrastructure intact, drift-audit fresh with 17 curmudgeon candidates queued.
